name: Crunchy Taco Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Hot chili with BEANS (15 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the ground beef in a 2-quart casserole dish.
2. Add onions and microwave on high for 4 to 6 minutes, stirring occasionally until the meat is thoroughly cooked.
3. Drain excess grease if needed.
4. Stir in chili with BEANS, tomato sauce, tomato paste, chili powder, and salt.
5. Microwave on high for an additional 6 to 8 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
6. Sprinkle 1 cup of corn chips evenly over a greased 8x8 inch baking dish.
7. Spoon the meat mixture over the chips.
8. Top with the remaining corn chips and sprinkle with cheese.
9. Microwave on high for 1 to 2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
10. Serve with lettuce and salsa.
